log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 10 damage. Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster HP: 57/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster HP: 40/67
--- Mountain Dwarf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 40/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
